results.title: We're Retired and Wealthy. I Want to Splurge but My Wife Says 'No.'
results.summary: We're 67 with $5.8 million after years of scrimping. I want to spend $300K on much-needed home renovations and a new car. How do I get my wife to say "yes"?

results.title: When Managing Your Wealth Feels Like a Pain, Simplify
results.author: FRANK J. LEGAN
results.summary: Multiple accounts, inherited assets and life transitions can make finances harder to manage when you retire. Simplifying what you have is a smart move.

results.title: The Retirement Spending Mistake Even Careful Savers Make (and How to Fix It)
results.author: PATRICK PAYNE, PH.D., CFP®
results.summary: Playing it too safe could mean trips not taken, educations not funded, life not enjoyed. Don't abandon caution — just build contingency plans for your portfolio.

results.title: Are Your Retirement Savings on Track at Ages 55 to 60? Take Our Quiz
results.author: DONNA FUSCALDO
results.summary: Find out if your retirement savings are on track with our quick quiz.

results.title: The 5 Trusts You Need to Understand
results.author: DONNA LEVALLEY
results.summary: You can use these trusts to cement your legacy, organize your estate and limit your exposure to estate and gift taxes.
